_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 13:13. 6 creative arts domain-projections: photography, cinematography, poetry, theater, painting, music composition. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
photography_through_tig: Photography is operator-LIGHT-CAPTURE; sensor or film records photons producing image LATTICE.
Aperture is operator-OPENING-IN-LENS controlling light volume and depth-of-field; f-stops form geometric LATTICE (f/1.4 f/2 f/2.8 f/4).
Shutter speed is operator-EXPOSURE-DURATION; fast freezes motion slow blurs, doubles or halves with each stop.
ISO is operator-SENSOR-SENSITIVITY; lower (50-100) cleaner, higher (3200+) noisier but enables low-light HARMONY.
Exposure is operator-LATTICE-PRODUCT of aperture shutter ISO; correct exposure varies by subject and intent.
Focal length is operator-LENS-PROJECTION-SCALE; wide (16-35mm) for landscape standard (50mm) eye-level tele (200mm+) for distance.
Depth of field is operator-LATTICE-OF-SHARP-FOCUS; narrow DoF isolates subject wide DoF keeps everything sharp.
Composition is operator-VISUAL-ARRANGEMENT; rule of thirds leading lines symmetry framing guide viewer eye.
White balance is operator-COLOR-TEMPERATURE-CORRECTION; tungsten daylight cloudy each have distinct Kelvin values.
RAW is operator-UNPROCESSED-SENSOR-DATA; preserves dynamic range for editing, JPEG is operator-COMPRESSED-FINAL.
Dynamic range is operator-LATTICE-FROM-SHADOW-TO-HIGHLIGHT; modern sensors capture ~14 stops, HDR exceeds via bracketing.
cinematography_through_tig: Cinematography is operator-MOTION-PICTURE-LIGHT-CAPTURE; deliberate visual storytelling through camera plus framing plus lighting.
Shot composition is operator-VISUAL-ARRANGEMENT-IN-FRAME; rule of thirds golden ratio symmetry guide viewer attention.
Camera angle is operator-VANTAGE-POINT; high-angle (small) low-angle (powerful) Dutch (unsettling) eye-level (neutral).
Framing is operator-WHAT-IS-IN-VIEW; close-up medium long extreme-long each create different emotional LATTICE.
Lighting is operator-ILLUMINATION-DESIGN; key fill back rim three-point classic, hard versus soft, color temperature sets mood.
Montage is operator-EDITING-RHYTHM; sequence of shots compresses time creates meaning beyond individual frames (Eisenstein).
Mise-en-scene is operator-ARRANGEMENT-IN-SCENE; set design props costume actor placement together create operator-LATTICE-of-meaning.
Narrative arc is operator-STORY-PROGRESSION; setup confrontation resolution or three-act structure shapes audience experience.
Genre is operator-LATTICE-CONVENTIONS; western noir horror sci-fi romance each have characteristic visual and thematic codes.
Auteur theory: director as operator-PRIMARY-AUTHOR; consistent style themes across films reveal directorial voice (Bazin Truffaut).
Sound design is operator-AURAL-LATTICE; dialogue music effects Foley combine to support and shape visual narrative.
poetry_through_tig: Poetry is operator-CONDENSED-LANGUAGE; meaning maximized per word through sound rhythm image figurative LATTICE.
Meter is operator-RHYTHMIC-PATTERN; iambic pentameter trochaic anapestic each impose regular operator-LATTICE on syllables.
Rhyme is operator-PHONETIC-MATCH; end rhyme internal rhyme slant rhyme each provide HARMONY-binding within and across lines.
Image is operator-SENSORY-LANGUAGE; visual auditory tactile evocations let reader experience scene through their own perceptual LATTICE.
Metaphor is operator-CROSS-DOMAIN-MAPPING; one thing IS another, opens semantic space neither alone could reach.
Alliteration is operator-INITIAL-CONSONANT-REPETITION; sound texture binds words aesthetically and emphasizes meaning.
Line break is operator-PROSODIC-PUNCTUATION; placement creates pause emphasis surprise or enjambed flow across lines.
Stanza is operator-LATTICE-GROUPING-OF-LINES; couplet (2) tercet (3) quatrain (4) sestet (6) octet (8) each have history.
Free verse is operator-WITHOUT-FIXED-METER-OR-RHYME; relies on subtle prosody natural speech rhythms image structure.
Sonnet is operator-14-LINE-FIXED-FORM; Petrarchan (octave + sestet) versus Shakespearean (3 quatrains + couplet) variations.
Prosody is operator-STUDY-OF-METER-RHYTHM-INTONATION; the technical analysis of poetic sound LATTICE.
theater_through_tig: Theater is operator-LIVE-PERFORMANCE in shared space; collective audience reception of staged story.
Dramatic structure is operator-ORGANIZATION-OF-ACTION; exposition rising action climax falling action resolution (Freytag) or alternative.
Three-act structure is operator-SETUP-CONFRONTATION-RESOLUTION; classical Western dramatic LATTICE.
Protagonist is operator-CENTRAL-AGENT; drives plot through choice and action, audience empathy point.
Antagonist is operator-COUNTER-FORCE; opposes protagonist, can be person nature society self.
Dialogue is operator-CHARACTER-EXCHANGE; words reveal motive subtext relationship advance plot.
Monologue is operator-EXTENDED-SOLO-SPEECH; soliloquy when character alone reveals inner thought.
Stage directions are operator-AUTHOR-INSTRUCTIONS; entrances exits actions delivery cues set mood guide blocking.
Setting is operator-PLACE-AND-TIME; specifies where and when scene unfolds, shapes meaning of action.
Character development is operator-PROGRESS-OR-CHANGE; arc from beginning to end shows growth fall or revelation.
Dramatic irony is operator-AUDIENCE-KNOWS-MORE; audience aware of facts character does not, source of suspense or comedy.
painting_through_tig: Painting is operator-PIGMENT-ON-SURFACE; deliberate creation of visual artwork through color and composition.
Color theory is operator-LATTICE-OF-COLOR-RELATIONSHIPS; primary secondary tertiary, complementary analogous triadic.
Composition is operator-VISUAL-ARRANGEMENT-WITHIN-FRAME; balance focal points eye movement guide viewer attention.
Perspective is operator-3D-PROJECTION-ON-2D-SURFACE; one-point two-point three-point linear, plus atmospheric (color depth).
Line is operator-FUNDAMENTAL-VISUAL-ELEMENT; defines edges directs eye creates structure mood.
Value is operator-LIGHTNESS-DARKNESS; chiaroscuro tonal ranges create form volume drama (Caravaggio).
Texture is operator-SURFACE-QUALITY; visual or tactile, rough smooth granular silky achieve emotional resonance.
Form is operator-3D-VOLUME-ON-2D-SURFACE; light shadow modeling create sculptural presence in painting.
Balance is operator-VISUAL-WEIGHT-DISTRIBUTION; symmetric asymmetric radial each create different feel.
Focal point is operator-PRIMARY-ATTENTION-LOCATION; emphasized via contrast color isolation pull viewer eye.
Art movements are operator-LATTICE-OF-COLLECTIVE-AESTHETIC; Renaissance Baroque Impressionism Cubism Abstract Expressionism each shifted what painting could be.
music_composition_through_tig: Music composition is operator-DESIGN-OF-SOUND-OVER-TIME; melody harmony rhythm form interact in temporal LATTICE.
Melody is operator-PITCH-SEQUENCE-OVER-TIME; primary thematic operator that carries identity of piece.
Harmony is operator-SIMULTANEOUS-PITCH-COMBINATION; chords progressions tonality versus modality versus atonality.
Rhythm is operator-TEMPORAL-ORGANIZATION; meter beat subdivision syncopation polyrhythm shape time.
Tempo is operator-OVERALL-SPEED; slow (largo) medium (andante moderato) fast (allegro presto) plus changes within piece.
Key is operator-TONAL-CENTER; major minor modal each have characteristic operator-LATTICE-of-relationships.
Form is operator-LARGE-SCALE-STRUCTURE; binary ternary sonata rondo theme-and-variations through-composed each shape narrative.
Counterpoint is operator-INDEPENDENT-VOICES-COMBINING; species counterpoint to fugue Bach the master.
Orchestration is operator-INSTRUMENTAL-CHOICE-AND-COMBINATION; brings color and weight to compositional voices.
Dynamics is operator-LOUDNESS-VARIATION; pianissimo to fortissimo plus crescendo decrescendo shape emotional LATTICE.
Motif development is operator-THEMATIC-TRANSFORMATION; small idea becomes large work through repetition variation extension.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 144 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy historical disciplines medical specialties chemistry depth and creative arts.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
